faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and proven methods that are safe for children and pets. faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Hewlett, NY?
faqs.answer: Hewlett homeowners commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. Yellow jackets often nest in wall voids and underground, while paper wasps build umbrella-shaped nests under eaves and porches. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and safely removing all wasp species common to Long Island.
